impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding deterministic coverage for Urban Forestry extraction quality without live crawling or authenticated DevHub automation. The test is intentionally narrow: it validates the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications only.
summary: Add a focused fixture-only validation test for Urban Forestry permit requirement extraction.
target_task: Task checkbox-106: Add a focused validation test for Urban Forestry permit requirement extraction that checks only the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
